generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures RGB-D images for environmental perception using Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraRGBDDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures ego vehicle speed and steering angle via onboard sensors."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data stream transmitted from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraRGBDDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "RGB-D image data stream transmitted from Intel Deepsense D435i camera."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) transmitted from onboard sensors."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering algorithm for processing raw LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements Kalman filtering for generating object tracks (ID, position, velocity) from clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic for speed adjustment and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks containing ID, position, and velocity data generated from point cloud processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of ego vehicle speed and steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateMonitoringEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data for object detection and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance CameraRGBDData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB-D image data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraRGBDDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnvironmentalPerceptionEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles point cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and tracking (Kalman filter) implemented in MATLAB/Simulink and Python 3.8."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes ISO 15622 compliant ACC logic for speed adjustment and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation FE for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between ROS2 and UDP protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DataReportingService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication and node lifecycle management onboard the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, ActuationService
]

instance Jetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware integration and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:enables OnboardDataPreprocessingService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes object tracks (ID, position, velocity) for visualization and decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, FleetManagementService
]

instance VehicleStateMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for performance analytics."
    DTDFVocab:enables PerformanceAnalyticsService
]

instance EnvironmentalPerceptionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes RGB-D camera data for environmental perception and obstacle detection."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CREOSimulateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CREO Simulate integration for predictive maintenance of brake systems and other components."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects real-time sensor data streams (LiDAR, camera, vehicle state) from the Physical Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataCollectionInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates and maintains object tracks (ID, position, velocity) using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes ISO 15622 compliant ACC logic for speed adjustment and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCParameterOptimizationInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote enabling/disabling of ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance DataReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports (timeseries) of object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceReportInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supports integration with CREO Simulate for health monitoring of brake systems and other components."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance FleetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides data-driven insights for optimizing ACC parameters across multiple vehicles."
    DTDFVocab:provides FleetOptimizationInsight
]

instance OnboardDataPreprocessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Handles data pre-processing, actuation, and LiDAR tracking onboard the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:provides OnboardProcessingInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Converts DT commands into physical actions (motor actuation, steering servo, emergency braking)."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorActuationAction, SteeringActuationAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance PerformanceAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time reports on vehicle state, object tracks, and ACC behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time collection of LiDAR point clouds, camera feeds, and vehicle state data for DT processing."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks containing ID, position, and velocity data for decision-making."
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) in 3D environment."
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks and projected driving path in 3D environment."
]

instance ACCParameterOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into desired speed adjustments and emergency braking thresholds for ACC optimization."
]

instance PerformanceAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time reports on vehicle state, object tracks, and ACC behavior for performance monitoring."
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for analysis."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection in sensor data (e.g., LiDAR outliers) for predictive maintenance."
]

instance FleetOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for optimizing ACC parameters across multiple vehicles in a fleet."
]

instance OnboardProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Onboard data pre-processing, actuation, and LiDAR tracking executed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano."
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC and adjustment of desired speed parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed voltage commands into physical movement via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SteeringActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts steering angle via servo mechanisms based on ACC commands."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Direct emergency braking command transmitted from DT to PT, overriding normal ACC operations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts voltage commands from DT into physical movement of the vehicle's motor."
]

instance SteeringServoMechanism : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adjusts steering angle of the vehicle based on ACC commands."
]

instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Executes emergency braking commands directly from the DT, overriding normal ACC operations."
]

// C1: Environment
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Hosts core DT logic including ACC computation, data collection, and reporting."
    base:contains DigitalTwinCoreComponent, DataTranslationFE, ActuationFE, PresentationFE
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano to handle data pre-processing, actuation, and LiDAR tracking."
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleStateSensor, PointCloudProcessingComponent, ActuationComponent
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Deployed on separate hardware (cloud/edge server) for 3D Visualization and Control Panel."
    base:contains UserInterfaceComponent, ControlPanelComponent, VisualizationServer
]

// C1: Components
instance DigitalTwinCoreComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Core component hosting ACC computation and data collection logic in the Digital Twin Entity."
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment."
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity responsible for converting DT commands into physical actions."
]

instance PresentationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Presentation Functional Entity for 3D visualization and user interface components."
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Onboard microcomputer running NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for data processing and actuation."
]

instance PointCloudProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking."
]

instance ActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component handling motor actuation, steering servo, and emergency braking commands."
]

instance UserInterfaceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization UI for monitoring vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel for remote management of ACC parameters and emergency commands."
]

instance VisualizationServer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Server component for rendering 3D CAD representations of vehicle and environment."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT influences the PT through the following outputs: **1) Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** and sent to the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity**, which converts them into motor voltage commands. **2) Remote management commands**: Includes **enable/disable ACC**, **modify desired speed**, and **emergency braking** via the **Control Panel** (User Entity). **3) Actuation signals**: Transmitted over **ROS2** (for onboard components) and **Wi-Fi** (for remote commands) with **100 ms synchronization accuracy** (clock synchronization)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with the following time-scale constraints: **1) Real-time synchronization**: Data collection and actuation must adhere to a **100 ms end-to-end latency** (PT to DT and vice versa) as per **3GPP TS 22.185**. **2) Clock synchronization**: Devices must maintain **100 ms accuracy** for event ordering and coordination. **3) Perception cycle**: Object tracking updates occur at the **LiDAR/camera frame rate** (e.g., 10 Hz for LiDAR). **4) Control loop**: ACC computations are executed at a frequency sufficient to meet the **100 ms latency requirement**, with actuation commands sent in real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **entity-based architecture** inspired by **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration: **1) Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **data pre-processing** (e.g., point cloud clustering). **2) Digital Twin Entity**: Executes **ACC logic**, **data collection**, **reporting**, and **data storage** (SQL). **3) User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** for remote management. **4) Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures interoperability between entities. **5) Deployment**: Components are distributed across **onboard (Jetson Orin Nano)** and **external (cloud/edge) hardware**. The constellation enables **computation offloading**, **real-time monitoring**, and **remote control** while adhering to **100 ms latency** and **synchronization** constraints."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages: **1) Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and **simulators** (e.g., **CREO Simulate**). **2) Validation Phase**: Validates compliance with **ISO 15622** (ACC performance class I) and **3GPP latency requirements**. **3) Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** during vehicle operation. **4) Product Lifecycle Management**: Supports **digital threads** for end-to-end information flow (e.g., data collection for fleet optimization). The DT represents the PT **as operated**, not as designed or manufactured."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through: **1) Real-time data synchronization**: **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization** for accurate event ordering. **2) Model validation**: **ACC logic** adheres to **ISO 15622** (performance class I). **3) Sensor fusion**: **LiDAR + camera** data is processed via **DBSCAN (clustering)** and **Kalman filtering (tracking)** for high-fidelity object tracks. **4) Verification**: **ROS2 middleware** ensures deterministic communication. **5) Uncertainty management**: **Data Translation FE** handles unit conversions and message alignment to mitigate data inconsistencies. **6) Safety validation**: **Emergency braking** commands override normal operations to ensure safety."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT uses the following technical connections: **1) Onboard Communication**: **ROS2** for inter-node communication (e.g., between **Point Cloud Clustering** and **Actuation**). **2) Inter-Entity Communication**: **Wi-Fi (UDP protocol)** for data exchange between **Physical Twin Entity**, **Digital Twin Entity**, and **User Entity**. **3) Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms end-to-end** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**). **4) Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **±100 ms accuracy** for event ordering. **5) Data Serialization**: **Data Translation FE** standardizes message formats and units. **6) Network Architecture**: **Star topology** with the **Digital Twin Entity** as the central hub."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across the following hosting environments: **1) Onboard Hardware**: **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (runs **Physical Twin Entity** and **Digital Twin Entity** components). **2) External Hardware**: **Cloud/edge server** hosts **User Entity** (3D Visualization, Control Panel) and **SQL database**. **3) Software Deployment**: Each **Functional Entity (FE)** is implemented as an **independent ROS2 package**, enabling modular upgrades. **4) Middleware**: **ROS2** manages node lifecycle and inter-process communication. **5) Network Deployment**: **Wi-Fi** connects onboard and external components with **≤100 ms latency**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT enables horizontal integration with external systems through: **1) Data Export**: **Reporting FE** generates **human-readable timeseries reports** for external analysis. **2) Simulator Integration**: Supports **CREO Simulate** for predictive maintenance (e.g., brake systems). **3) Cloud/Edge Connectivity**: **Digital Twin Entity** can interface with **external databases** or **AI agents** via **User Entity**. **4) Standardized Interfaces**: **Data Translation FE** ensures compatibility with external systems using **OPC UA** or custom protocols. **5) Digital Threads**: Enables **end-to-end information flow** for product lifecycle management (PLM)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy considerations are not explicitly detailed in the document. However, the system implies: **1) Data Collection**: Vehicle state and sensor data are **collected by the PT owner** (e.g., autonomous vehicle operator). **2) Data Storage**: Stored in an **external SQL database**, raising potential **privacy concerns** if not secured. **3) Remote Management**: **Control Panel** allows remote access, requiring **authentication/authorization** for security. **4) Compliance**: No explicit mention of **GDPR** or **automotive-specific privacy standards** (e.g., **ISO/SAE 21434**)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: **1) Architectural Standard**: **ISO 23247** (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2) as the reference architecture, with deviations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity** addition). **2) ACC Standard**: **ISO 15622** for performance class I ACC implementation. **3) Communication Standard**: **ROS2** for middleware and **UDP over Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication. **4) Latency Standard**: **3GPP TS 22.185** (≤100 ms end-to-end latency for V2V communication). **5) Clock Synchronization**: **±100 ms accuracy** (aligned with hardware limitations). **6) Terminology**: **ISO/IEC 30173:2023** for DT concepts."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through: **1) Safety Mechanisms**: **Emergency braking** commands override normal operations to prevent accidents. **2) Latency Guarantees**: **≤100 ms end-to-end** ensures real-time responsiveness. **3) Clock Synchronization**: **±100 ms accuracy** prevents event ordering issues. **4) Remote Management**: **Control Panel** requires secure authentication for **enable/disable ACC** and **emergency braking**. **5) Data Integrity**: **Data Translation FE** validates message formats and units. **6) Hardware Redundancy**: **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** provides compute resources for critical operations. **7) Compliance**: Adheres to **ISO 15622** for ACC safety. **Limitations**: No explicit mention of **cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., encryption, intrusion detection) or **fail-safe mechanisms** for remote operations."
]
